title: Community Content Pack Manifest
description: Every community content pack must include this manifest. It declares all new content, references to core entities, and registers lore files for ChromaDB indexing.

pack_id.description: Unique, kebab-case identifier for this content pack. Must be globally unique.

author.description: GitHub handle or org name of the primary contributor.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this pack adds to the world.

sentinel_min_version.description: Minimum Sentinel engine version required to use this pack.

adds.description: Declarations of net-new content this pack introduces. Community content cannot overwrite Core entities.

locations.description: Names of new locations introduced by this pack.

npcs.description: Names of new NPCs introduced by this pack.

items.description: Names of new items introduced by this pack.

factions.description: Names of new factions introduced by this pack.

mcp_tools.description: Names of new MCP server tools bundled with this pack.

references.description: Core entity unique_ids this pack references but does NOT modify. Declared for dependency tracking.

lore_files.description: All Markdown lore files in this pack, registered for ChromaDB indexing. Paths must be under data/lore/community/.

rag_priority.description: ChromaDB retrieval priority for this pack's documents. Core lore always uses priority 10. Community packs use 1-9.
